name: Rhubarb Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the flour, sugar, and orange peel.
2. Mix in the chopped rhubarb until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Place an 9-inch pie plate lined with Orange Pastry on a baking sheet.
4. Fill the pastry-lined pie plate with the rhubarb mixture.
5. Dot the top of the filling with butter or margarine.
6. Top with a lattice crust, if desired.
7. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 40 to 50 minutes, or until golden brown and set.
8. Serve warm with vanilla ice cream.
Substitute orange juice for water in your favorite pastry recipe.
